chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: In today's video, I will tell you about OS Module.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: OS Module helps you perform many operations of your operating system.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: For example, you want to execute a particular program.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: Or you want to copy a file from one folder to another.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: You will get to write many such programs in the future.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: If you are working on a big project, how will you write?

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: OS Module is a built-in module in Python.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: It is a very amazing module.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: With the help of this module, you can automate the operations of your operating system.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: For example, you want to delete a file named 1.py, 1.txt or 1.jpg in every folder.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: You can do that.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: If you want to create a file in every folder, you can do that.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: In fact, I personally automated the folder structure of 100 days of code,

chunks.text: in which I had to manually put files one by one.

chunks.title: os Module in Python
chunks.text: I automated it with OS Module.
